testsuite.name: 边界条件测试

testcase.name: 特殊字符在脚本中应正常处理
大量特征数据应正常处理
长脚本内容应正常处理

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:48.848 [Test worker] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionControllerTest$EdgeCaseTests]: EdgeCaseTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-29 17:22:48.856 [Test worker] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.ruleengine.RuleEngineApplication for test class com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionControllerTest$EdgeCaseTests 2026-03-29 17:22:48.862 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: special-chars-rule 2026-03-29 17:22:48.862 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule special-chars-rule executed in 5ms, decision: PASS 2026-03-29 17:22:48.869 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: large-features-rule 2026-03-29 17:22:48.870 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule large-features-rule executed in 20ms, decision: PASS 2026-03-29 17:22:48.935 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: unicode-rule 2026-03-29 17:22:48.936 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule unicode-rule executed in 5ms, decision: PASS 2026-03-29 17:22:48.942 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: long-script-rule 2026-03-29 17:22:48.943 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule long-script-rule executed in 15ms, decision: PASS
